results.query: 帮我从 careers.example.org/openings 的前 2 页招聘列表里抓职位名称和工作地点。

browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"

browser close

browser extract "Extract the first 2 pages of job listings" '{"jobTitle": "string", "location": "string"}'
browser act "Scroll down to load more jobs"

if "more pages" in browser.observe("Check if there are more pages to load"):
    browser.act "Click the next page button"
    browser.extract "Extract the next page of job listings" '{"jobTitle": "string", "location": "string"}'
browser.close
gold_lines: browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
browser act "Click the Next Page button"
browser extract "Extract all job titles and locations on this page" '{"jobs":[{"jobTitle":"string","location":"string"}]}'
pred_lines: browser extract "Extract the first 2 pages of job listings" '{"jobTitle": "string", "location": "string"}'
